⚡ v0.1.0 — Research Laboratory · Under Active Construction

Architecting the
Machine-Mediated Discovery Layer

GEONEXUS is an advanced engineering laboratory operating at the intersection of knowledge graph theory, generative information retrieval, and agentic protocol design. We develop production-grade frameworks for Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), AI Engine Optimization (AEO), and AI Optimization (AIO) — deploying graph-native architectures, transformer-aligned content ontologies, and autonomous commerce protocols for enterprises engineering their presence across the emerging AI-mediated discovery stratum.

Explore the Stack → Research Collaboration →
115K+
Knowledge Graph Nodes Mapped
99.8%
Data Discovery Latency Reduction
4,216%
Documented ROI (Knowledge Graph)
384-d
HNSW Vector Index Dimensionality
Core Thesis

The Tri-Stack Convergence Hypothesis

We posit that three distinct technological strata are converging — generative retrieval, agentic protocol execution, and knowledge graph infrastructure — to form a unified machine-mediated discovery layer that will subsume traditional search architectures within 24–36 months.

🌐

Generative Retrieval Optimization (GEO)

GEO addresses the inference-time citation surface — the probability distribution over source documents that a transformer-based retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipeline conditions on when synthesizing an answer. We engineer entity-dense content ontologies, schema.org-compliant knowledge organization systems (KOS), and topical authority manifolds that maximize a brand's presence within the top-K retrieved contexts across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google SGE, and Claude.

Core mechanisms: Entity salience optimization · Dense passage retrieval (DPR) alignment · Citation graph topology manipulation · Context window prioritization

Read the Framework →
🤖

Agentic Engine Optimization (AEO)

AEO targets the autonomous action layer — the emerging protocol stack through which LLM-invoked agents discover, evaluate, negotiate, and transact with vendor systems. We architect graph-based capability registries, agent-readable API surfaces (AgentQL/Function Calling schemas), verifiable credential infrastructures (W3C VC/DPoP), and intent-resolution pipelines that enable autonomous agents to execute multi-step workflows across organizational boundaries without human intervention.

Core mechanisms: Capability discovery protocols · Tool-augmented generation (TAG) alignment · Verifiable attestation chains · Agent-to-agent negotiation frameworks

Read the Protocol →
🧠

AI Infrastructure Optimization (AIO)

AIO addresses the organizational decision surface — the martech stack, data architecture, and governance substrate that determines an enterprise's capacity to deploy, measure, and iteratively refine AI-mediated operations. We engineer composable data planes (CDP + Data Warehouse + Reverse ETL), graph-native metadata catalogs, and Compliance-as-Code pipelines that embed AI governance directly into CI/CD workflows.

Core mechanisms: Warehouse-native composable CDP · Metric semantic layers · FinOps for inference cost allocation · Automated governance via Open Policy Agent (OPA)

Read the Architecture →
Research & Analysis

Engineering Reports from the Frontier

Primary research drawn from production-grade knowledge graph analyses, enterprise stack audits, and agentic protocol implementations across financial services and hospitality.

GEO

GEO vs. SEO: A Formal Analysis of the Retrieval Paradigm Shift

A formal comparison of Search Engine Optimization and Generative Engine Optimization through the lens of information retrieval theory, citation graph topology, and transformer-based context window dynamics.

June 26, 2026
Case-Study

Martech Stack Graph Analysis: 5 Engineering Lessons from DBS Bank's 115K-Node Knowledge Graph

Production-grade graph analysis of DBS Bank's martech ecosystem revealed 3× redundant tag managers, 4 overlapping analytics pipelines, and 12+ deprecated library dependencies — with OPA-governed remediation achieving 916% ROI.

June 25, 2026
AEO

Agentic Commerce Protocol Architecture: Engineering the Autonomous Transaction Layer

The agentic commerce protocol stack encompasses capability discovery (CDP), tool-augmented generation (TAG), verifiable credentials (W3C VC 2.0), and agent-to-agent negotiation (A2A). Here's the architecture.

June 24, 2026
View All Research →
Audited Engagements

Production Deployments

Documented enterprise transformations with measured outcomes. Each engagement employed ArcadeDB-powered knowledge graph analysis producing 384-dimensional HNSW vector indexes across multi-domain entity landscapes.

DBS Bank — Financial Services

Martech Stack Graph Analysis & Governance Automation

Comprehensive knowledge graph mapping of 115,000+ nodes across the dbs.com.sg marketing technology ecosystem. Identified 3× redundant tag management containers, 4 overlapping analytics pipelines, and 12+ deprecated JavaScript libraries via graph traversal. Deployed OpenPolicyAgent-governed Compliance-as-Code pipeline with pre-commit hooks enforcing SRI hash requirements, CSP headers, and metadata schema compliance.

0.8s
TTFB Reduction
916%
5-Year ROI
1.1mo
Payback Period
The Ascott Limited — Hospitality

Agentic Commerce Readiness & Cubby-Native AEO Architecture

Architecture-level assessment of Ascott's 14-brand digital ecosystem spanning Salesforce Data Cloud, composable headless CMS, and the Cubby AI concierge (900K+ interactions analyzed). Produced AEO maturity model mapping the transition from informational chatbot to Agentforce-powered transactional agent. Designed Schema.org/JSON-LD property entity framework for machine-readable hotel inventory across 400+ properties.

14
Brand Entity Graph
900K
Interaction Corpus Analyzed
L4→L5
AEO Maturity Trajectory
Frasers Hospitality — Hospitality

Legacy Graph Extraction & Composable Data Plane Blueprint

Reverse-engineered entity-relationship graph from 25-year-old FPMS (Fraser Property Management System) codebase, extracting 2,400+ undocumented stored procedures, 180+ database views, and 47 inter-system dependencies. Produced GraphQL API gateway migration blueprint enabling event-sourced data synchronization between legacy monolith and modern BigQuery/Hightouch composable CDP stack.

2,400+
Legacy Procedures Mapped
47
Inter-System Dependencies
4-Phase
36-Month Migration Plan
View Full Audit Reports →
Open Protocols

Engineering Frameworks Under Development

Protocols, taxonomies, and evaluation benchmarks currently being specified, tested, and refined.

GEO-Score v0.1 — Citation Probability Estimator

Probabilistic model estimating the likelihood of a given document being selected as a citation source by a transformer-based RAG pipeline. Evaluates entity density, factual consistency, source freshness, and topological centrality within the citation graph. Current AUC-ROC: 0.82 on held-out validation set.

AEO-ML v0.1 — Agent Readiness Maturity Ladder

Five-level maturity model (L1–L5) evaluating an organization's capability to participate in autonomous agent-mediated commerce. Assesses API surface completeness, verifiable credential infrastructure, capability discovery protocol adherence, and agent-to-agent negotiation readiness.

Knowledge Graph Lens — Dependency Analyzer

ArcadeDB-native tool for extracting, visualizing, and querying marketing technology dependency graphs. Supports openCypher traversal, 384-dim HNSW vector similarity search, and automated gap/redundancy detection via graph motif analysis.

Compliance-as-Code — OPA Policy Suite

Open Policy Agent rule set for automated marketing technology governance. Enforces tag management consolidation, JavaScript library versioning, metadata schema compliance, and CSP/SRI security requirements via CI/CD pipeline integration.

Engineering the Discovery Layer

This is a research laboratory under active construction. If you're architecting AI-mediated discovery infrastructure, we welcome collaboration.

GEO · AEO · AIO — Engineering the Future of AI-Discoverable Content

[THIS SITE IS UNDER ACTIVE CONSTRUCTION — FRAMEWORKS, BENCHMARKS, AND ARCHITECTURES ARE BEING CONTINUOUSLY REFINED.] GEONEXUS is a next-generation agency and education platform specializing in Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), AI Engine Optimization (AEO), and Artificial Intelligence Optimization (AIO). We help enterprises architect, optimize, and future-proof their digital presence for the age of AI-driven discovery.
